creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
software@, can you please attach some build logs? Preferably Poudriere's? Default devel/xdg-utils with default options on all dependencies builds just fine for me.

Also please note libxslt will update to 1.1.29, that version carries a lot of fixes:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=210298
